ns1:revision.ns1:comment:
Created page with "2.15.8 '''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 8.10 (4.18.0-553.82.1.el8_10) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''

*v1.47.3.wc2 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.12.X, 2.14 '''Issues list to follow '''Bug * [LU-14441] - Oops in o..."
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
2.15.8 '''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 8.10 (4.18.0-553.82.1.el8_10) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 8.10 (4.18.0-553.82.1.el8_10) *RHEL 9.7 (9.7 5.14.0-611.7.1.el9_7) *SLES15 SP6 (6.4.0-150600.23.73.1) *Ubuntu 22.04 (5.15.0-88) '''Minimum recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.47.3.wc2 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.12.X, 2.14 '''Issues list to follow '''Bug * [LU-14441] - Oops in obd_set_max_rpcs_in_flight() * [LU-15388] - Wrong dotdot FID parameter for osd_add_dot_dotdot() * [LU-16203] - zero records and empty plain llogs in update llog catalog * [LU-16838] - LU-15670 test does not use import name * [LU-18783] - pjdfstest test chmod 2 fails with ZFS 2.3.0 * [LU-18947] - dmu_tx: rename dmu_tx_assign() flags from TXG_* to DMU_TX_* * [LU-19121] - ldiskfs/e2fsck mishandle fast symlink with external xattr inode '''Test * [LU-15639] - replay-dual test_31 error: set_param: param_path 'at_max': No such file or directory '''Task * [LU-17402] - Support RHEL 8.10 * [LU-18970] - kernel update [RHEL 8.10 4.18.0-553.51.1.el8_10] * [LU-19451] - RHEL 9.7 support * [LU-19492] - kernel update [RHEL 9.6 5.14.0-570.62.1.el9_6] * [LU-19494] - kernel update [RHEL 8.10 4.18.0-553.83.1.el8_10] * [LU-19508] - kernel update [SLES15 SP6 6.4.0-150600.23.73.1] '''Improvement * [LU-18356] - test-framework to fetch except list from server for interop testing * [LU-18971] - Support ZFS 2.3.2
